title: BD India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: BD India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? BD India in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About BD India:
BD India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BD India!
